рҹ“ҡдёҖй”®еҜје…Ҙ1::http://www.baidu.com?wd=0гҖҒ2гҖҒгҖҗmdгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷйҡҫеҸ—дә‘.зӣҙй“ҫз”ҹжҲҗгҖӮorдёҖй”®еҜје…ҘгҖӢв—ҺвҖјпёҸйЎ»е…ҲдёҠдј д№Ұжәҗж–Үд»¶пјҲtxtпјүеҲ°йҡҫеҸ—дә‘в—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://www.yckceo.com/yuedu/shuyuan/index.html,гҖҗhttp://www.yckceo.com/favicon.icoгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҡжәҗд»“еә“.д№ҰжәҗгҖӢв—Һв—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://www.yckceo.com/yuedu/rssyuan/index.html,гҖҗhttp://www.yckceo.com/favicon.icoгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҡжәҗд»“еә“.и®ўйҳ…жәҗгҖӢв—Һв—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://www.yckceo.com/yiciyuan/tuyuan/index.html,гҖҗhttp://www.yckceo.com/favicon.icoгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҡжәҗд»“еә“.ејӮж¬Ўе…ғ.жј«з”»жәҗпјҲйңҖеӨҚеҲ¶й“ҫжҺҘеҲ°ејӮж¬Ўе…ғеҜје…ҘпјүгҖӢв—Һв– в—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙhttps://code.gitlink.org.cn/yi-c/yd/raw/branch/master/sy.jsonгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠвқӨпёҸдёҖзЁӢд№ҰжәҗгҖӢв—ҺgпҪңжҜҸжңҲжӣҙж–°в—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙhttps://code.gitlink.org.cn/yi-c/yd/raw/branch/master/dy.jsonгҖҗ/dy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠвқӨпёҸдёҖзЁӢи®ўйҳ…жәҗгҖӢв—ҺgпҪңжҜҸжңҲжӣҙж–°в—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://code.gitlink.org.cn/yi-c/yd/src/branch/master/README.mdгҖҗ/fb.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ§ЎжҹҘзңӢжңҖеҗҺжӣҙж–°ж—ҘжңҹгҖӢв—Һв– в—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙhttps://raw.githubusercontents.com/PB-pobing/pobing/pb/50.jsonгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠвқӨпёҸз ҙеҶ°д№ҰжәҗгҖӢв—ҺgпҪңйҡҸзјҳжӣҙж–°в—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://agit.ai/butterfly/pobingгҖҗ/fb.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ§ЎжҹҘзңӢжңҖеҗҺжӣҙж–°ж—ҘжңҹгҖӢв—Һв– в—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙhttps://ghproxy.com/https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zmn001125/booksources/master/sources/guaner.txtгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠвқӨпёҸе…іиҖід№Ұжәҗ.еҘійў‘еҗ‘гҖӢв—ҺgпҪңдҪӣзі»жӣҙж–°в—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://agit.ai/butterfly/guanerгҖҗ/fb.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ§ЎжҹҘзңӢжңҖеҗҺжӣҙж–°ж—ҘжңҹгҖӢв—Һв– в—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙhttps://raw.iqiq.io/XIU2/Yuedu/master/shuyuanгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠвқӨпёҸXIU2д№ҰжәҗгҖӢв—ҺgпҪңв—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://agit.ai/butterfly/xiu2/commits/branch/master/shuyuanгҖҗ/fb.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ§ЎжҹҘзңӢжңҖеҗҺжӣҙж–°ж—ҘжңҹгҖӢв—Һв– в—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙhttps://www.gitlink.org.cn/api/haxc/book/raw?filepath=bookSource.jsonгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠвқӨпёҸHaxcжј«з”»жәҗ.еҜје…Ҙж—¶жңүж ҮзӨәж—ҘжңҹгҖӢв—Һв– в—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙhttps://www.gitlink.org.cn/api/fcdlcb/ydsy/raw?filepath=bookSource.jsonгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’”йЈҺеҒңеңЁдәҶзӘ—иҫ№д№Ұжәҗ.22.8.18гҖӢв—ҺgпҪңе·ІдёҚжӣҙпјҹв—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙhttps://www.gitlink.org.cn/api/fcdlcb/ydsy/raw?filepath=exportRssSource.jsonгҖҗ/dy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’”йЈҺеҒңеңЁдәҶзӘ—иҫ№и®ўйҳ…жәҗ.22.8.18гҖӢв—ҺgпҪңе·ІдёҚжӣҙпјҹв—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://code.gitlink.org.cn/fcdlcb/ydsy/гҖҗ/fb.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ§ЎжҹҘзңӢжңҖеҗҺжӣҙж–°ж—ҘжңҹгҖӢв—Һв– в—Һ


рҹ“ҡдёҖй”®еҜје…Ҙ2::http://www.baidu.com?wd=https://legado.aoaostar.com/гҖҗ/yj.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷдёҖй”®еҜје…Ҙ.aoaostarж•ҙзҗҶж”¶йӣҶгҖӢв—ҺвҖјпёҸж ҮзӨәзҡ„ж—Ҙжңҹд»…дёәйҮҮйӣҶеҲ·ж–°ж—Ҙжңҹв—Һвҷһвҷһhttp://yuedu.miaogongzi.net/gx.htmlгҖҗ/yj.pngгҖ‘гҖҠвқӨпёҸдёҖй”®еҜје…Ҙ.е–өе…¬еӯҗж•ҙзҗҶж”¶йӣҶгҖӢв—ҺзҪ‘йЎөв—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://legado.git.llc/гҖҗ/yj.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷдёҖй”®еҜје…Ҙ.зҹҘе‘Ҫж•ҙзҗҶж”¶йӣҶгҖӢв—Һв– в—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://agit.ai/butterfly/yd/гҖҗmdгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ§ЎжҹҘзңӢд»ҘдёӢеҗ„еҗҲйӣҶзҡ„зүҲжң¬ж—ҘжңҹгҖӢв—Һд»…дҪңеҸӮиҖғ.дёәдёҠдј д»“еә“ж—Ҙжңҹ.йқһдҪңиҖ…еҸ‘еёғж—Ҙжңҹв—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙ/иҝ·иҝӯд№Ұжәҗ.jsonгҖҗmdгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷиҝ·иҝӯеёёз”Ёд№ҰжәҗгҖӢв—Һв—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙ/иҝ·иҝӯи®ўйҳ…жәҗ.jsonгҖҗmdгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷиҝ·иҝӯеёёз”Ёи®ўйҳ…жәҗгҖӢв—Һв—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙ/иҝ·иҝӯTTS.jsonгҖҗmdгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷиҝ·иҝӯTTSеңЁзәҝиҜӯйҹіеј•ж“ҺгҖӢв—ҺвҖјпёҸеңЁзәҝTTSжң—иҜ»дјҡиҖ—з”ЁеӨ§йҮҸжөҒйҮҸв—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙ/Namoд№Ұжәҗ.jsonгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷNamoд№ҰжәҗгҖӢв—Һв—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙ/й»„еҮЎеҮЎд№Ұжәҗ.jsonгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷй»„еҮЎеҮЎд№ҰжәҗгҖӢв—Һв—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙ/onedeд№Ұжәҗ.jsonгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷonedeд№ҰжәҗгҖӢв—Һв—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙ/дёҚдё–зҺ„еҘҮд№Ұжәҗ.jsonгҖҗ/sy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷдёҚдё–зҺ„еҘҮ.жҗңзҙўеј•ж“Һд№Ұжәҗ+йҖҡз”Ёд№ҰжәҗгҖӢв—Һв—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙ/дёҚдё–зҺ„еҘҮи®ўйҳ…жәҗ.jsonгҖҗ/dy.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷдёҚдё–зҺ„еҘҮ.йҖҡз”ЁеҸ‘зҺ°.и®ўйҳ…жәҗгҖӢв—Һв– в—Һвҷһвҷһрҹ“Ҙhttps://ghproxy.com/https://github.com/MD-butterfly/yd/raw/main/Engels.jsonгҖҗhttps://android-artworks.25pp.com/fs08/2023/01/03/9/110_03e44582413966c9a6310cf847cc08ba_con_130x130.pngгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’ҷEngelsи®ўйҳ…жәҗгҖӢв—ҺзңӢдәҶиә«дҪ“дјҡеҸҳеҫ—еҘҮжҖӘпҪңдёҚеҸҜд»Ҙж¶©ж¶©пјҒв—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://md-butterfly.github.io/yd/index.htmlгҖҗmdгҖ‘гҖҠрҹ’қдёҖй”®еҜје…Ҙ.иҝ·иҝӯж•ҙзҗҶж”¶йӣҶ.жҡӮдёҚз»ҙжҠӨжӣҙж–°иҝҷдёӘйЎөйқўдәҶгҖӢв—ҺзҪ‘йЎөв—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://md-butterfly.github.io/yd/readme.htmlгҖҗmdгҖ‘гҖҠreadmeгҖӢв—Һжң¬и®ўйҳ…жәҗзҡ„дёҖдәӣд№ұдёғе…«зіҹиҜҙжҳҺв—Һвҷһвҷһhttps://jq.qq.com/?_wv=1027&k=6xsTVR3UгҖҗhttp://pp.myapp.com/ma_icon/0/icon_10555_1657195559/256гҖ‘гҖҠжҡ—йҰҷиҝ·иқ¶QQдәӨжөҒзҫӨ462030508зӮ№жҲ‘и·іиҪ¬еҠ зҫӨгҖӢв—ҺиӢҘи·іиҪ¬ж”Ҝд»ҳиҜ·жӢ’з»қпјҢиҮӘе·ұжүӢеҠЁеҠ зҫӨпјҲдёӯжҜ’пјҹпјүв—Һ

<js>
try {
    $ = JSON.parse(src).text;
    if ($ == "no file") $ = [];
} catch (err) {
    reg = /^(https?\:\/\/((www|m)\.)?baidu\.com\/?\?wd=\s*)+/i;

    if (baseUrl == source.sourceUrl) {
        $ = [{
            name_all: "ж— жі•иҺ·еҸ–еҲҶзұ»пјҹеҸҜиғҪжІЎжңүеҗҜз”Ё",
            time: "еҸідёҠи§’ - гҖҗзҷ»еҪ•гҖ‘еҗҜз”ЁпјҢеҶҚгҖҗеҲ·ж–°еҲҶзұ»гҖ‘"
        }]
    }



    //зҪ‘з«ҷж•ҙеҗҲ
    else if (baseUrl.match(reg)) {
        $ = [];
        baseUrl.replace(reg, '').
        split(/\s*вҖў\s*/).map($$ => $.push({
            name_all: $$.match(/.*?гҖҠ(.*?)гҖӢ/)[1],
            time: $$.match(/в—Һ.*?в—Һ/) ? $$.match(/.*?в—Һ(.*?)в—Һ/)[1] : "",
            uri: $$.match(/гҖҗ.*?гҖ‘/) ? $$.match(/.*?гҖҗ(.*?)гҖ‘/)[1] : "",
            url: $$.match(/^([^гҖҗгҖҠв—Һ]*),?/)[1]
        }));
    }



    //и“қеҘҸдә‘
    else {

        //и“қеҘҸдә‘йқһеҲҶз»„й“ҫжҺҘ
        if (String(java.getString('text.дёҫжҠҘж–Үд»¶@href')).length) {
            $ = [{
                name_all: String(java.getString('class.md@textNodes')),
                icon: String(java.getString('class.md@textNodes')).replace(/.*\./, ''),
                size: String(java.getString('class.mtt@text')).replace(/\( /, '').replace(/ \)/, ''),
                time: String(java.getString('class.mf@textNodes')).replace(/.*\n/, ''),
                uri: baseUrl.replace(/^(.+com).*\/(.+)$/, '$2'),
                url: baseUrl.replace(/^(.+com).*\/(.+)$/, '$1/tp/$2')
            }]
        }


        //еҸ–ж¶ҲеҲҶдә«
        else if (String(java.getString('.off@text')).match(/еҸ–ж¶ҲеҲҶдә«/)) {
            $ = [{
                name_all: java.getString('.off@text'),
                time: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/g, ''),
                url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/g, '')
            }]
        }


        //и“қеҘҸдә‘еҲҶз»„й“ҫжҺҘ
        else {
            json = [];
            name = java.getString('.user-radio@text||title@text')
            java.getElements('#folder .mlink').forEach(a => {
                java.setContent(a);
                json.push({
                    name_all: java.getString('.filename@textNodes'),
                    url: java.getString('a@href'),
                    time: 'рҹ—ӮпёҸ folderгҖҖрҹ“‘ ' + (String(java.getString('.filesize@text')) || name)
                })
            })
           java.setContent(src);


            mat = baseUrl.match(/^(.*?\.com)[^##]*\/(.+)$/)
            url = mat[1]
            uri = mat[2]

            function $(reg) {
                return uri.match(reg) ? true : false
            }


            //getгҖҗpwdгҖ‘(й“ҫжҺҘжҸҗеҸ–з Ғ)
            pwd =
                $(/##[^гҖҗ]/) ? uri.match(/##(.*?)(гҖҗ|$)/)[1] :
                "";



            head = {
                method: "POST",
                params: {
                    uri: uri,
                    img: $(/гҖҗ[^гҖ‘]/) ? uri.match(/гҖҗ([^гҖ‘]+)/)[1] : ""
                }
            }




            //get гҖҗbodyгҖ‘
            eval(src.match(/var pgs;([\s\S]*?pgs.+;)/)[1]);
            eval('$=' + src.match(/data :([\s\S]*?\})/)[1]);
            head.body = Object.keys($).map(key => key + "=" + $[key]).join('&');


            //иЎҘе…ЁгҖҗurlгҖ‘
            url += "/filemoreajax.php," + JSON.stringify(head);



            //ajax
            $ = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
            $ = json.concat($.text != 0 ? $.text :

                //еҜҶз Ғй”ҷиҜҜжҸҗзӨә
                [{
                    name_all: $.info,
                    time: uri.replace(/[#\?].*/, '') + $.info,
                    url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/, '')
                }])
            baseUrl = url
        }
    }
}
java.put('url', baseUrl);
JSON.stringify($);

        else {

      json.push({

    })
java.setContent(src);


            mat = baseUrl.match(/^(.*?\.com)[^##]*\/(.+)$/)
            url = mat[1]
            uri = mat[2]

            function $(reg) {
                return uri.match(reg) ? true : false}


            //getгҖҗpwdгҖ‘(й“ҫжҺҘжҸҗеҸ–з Ғ)
            pwd =
$(/##[^гҖҗ]/) ? uri.match(/##(.*?)(гҖҗ|$)/)[1] :"";



head = {method: "POST", params: {uri: uri,
img: $(/гҖҗ[^гҖ‘]/)?uri.match(/гҖҗ([^гҖ‘]+)/)[1] :""}}


            //get гҖҗbodyгҖ‘
            eval(src.match(/var pgs;([\s\S]*?pgs.+;)/)[1]);
            eval('$=' + src.match(/data :([\s\S]*?\})/)[1]);
            head.body = Object.keys($).map(key => key + "=" + $[key]).join('&');


            //иЎҘе…ЁгҖҗurlгҖ‘
url += "/filemoreajax.php," + JSON.stringify(head);

            //ajax

             [{name_all: $.info,

                                        )

            $ = [{

                url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/g, '')
            }]
        }

        //рҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўи“қеҘҸдә‘еҲҶз»„й“ҫжҺҘ
        else {

      json.push({

          url: java.getString('a@href'),
          time: 'рҹ—ӮпёҸ folderгҖҖрҹ“‘ ' + (String(java.getString('.filesize@text')) || name) })
    })
java.setContent(src);


            mat = baseUrl.match(/^(.*?\.com)[^##]*\/(.+)$/)
            url = mat[1]

            function $(reg) {

            //getгҖҗpwdгҖ‘(й“ҫжҺҘжҸҗеҸ–з Ғ)
            pwd =
$(/##[^гҖҗ]/) ? uri.match(/##(.*?)(гҖҗ|$)/)[1] :"";



head = {method: "POST", params: {uri: uri,
img: $(/гҖҗ[^гҖ‘]/)?uri.match(/гҖҗ([^гҖ‘]+)/)[1] :""}}


            //get гҖҗbodyгҖ‘
            eval(src.match(/var pgs;([\s\S]*?pgs.+;)/)[1]);
            eval('$=' + src.match(/data :([\s\S]*?\})/)[1]);
            head.body = Object.keys($).map(key => key + "=" + $[key]).join('&');


            //иЎҘе…ЁгҖҗurlгҖ‘
url += "/filemoreajax.php," + JSON.stringify(head);

            //ajax
            $ = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
            $ = json.concat($.text != 0 ? $.text :
             //еҜҶз Ғй”ҷиҜҜжҸҗзӨә
             [{name_all: $.info,

               url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/, '') }]

}
//рҹ’ҷcatch(err)з»“жқҹ

java.put('url', baseUrl);

	mat = baseUrl.match(/^(.*?com)[^##]*\/(.+)$/)

		uri = java.put('uri', mat[2])

function $(reg){
		return uri.match(reg)?true:false
	}

//getгҖҗpwdгҖ‘(й“ҫжҺҘжҸҗеҸ–з Ғ)

"";

eval(result.match(/var pgs;([\s\S]*?pgs.+;)/)[1]);
eval('$='+result.match(/data :([\s\S]*?\})/)[1])

body = "";
for(key in $)body += key+'='+$[key]+'&';
body = String(body).replace(/&$/,'');

url += `/filemoreajax.php,{"method":"POST","body":"${body}"}`

java.ajax(url)}
</js>

<js>
try {$ = JSON.parse(src).text;
       if ($ == "no file") $ = []; } 

//catch (err)рҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ң
catch (err) {

        //еҸ–ж¶ҲеҲҶдә«рҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ў
        if (String(java.getString('.off@text')).match(/еҸ–ж¶ҲеҲҶдә«/)) {
            $ = [{
                name_all: java.getString('.off@text'),
                time: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/g, ''),
                url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/g, '')
                  }]   }


        //и“қеҘҸдә‘еҲҶз»„рҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ў
        else {
            json = [];
            name = java.getString('.user-radio@text||title@text')
            java.getElements('#folder .mlink').forEach(a => {         java.setContent(a);
                json.push({
                    name_all: java.getString('.filename@textNodes'),
                    url: java.getString('a@href'),
                    time: 'рҹ—ӮпёҸ folderгҖҖрҹ“‘ ' + (String(java.getString('.filesize@text')) || name)                      })
     })

           java.setContent(src);

            mat = baseUrl.match(/^(.*?\.com)[^##]*\/(.+)$/)
            url = mat[1]
            uri = mat[2]

            function $(reg) {
                return uri.match(reg) ? true : false }

            //getгҖҗpwdгҖ‘(й“ҫжҺҘжҸҗеҸ–з Ғ)
pwd =
$(/##[^гҖҗ]/) ? uri.match(/##(.*?)(гҖҗ|$)/)[1] : "";
java.put('pwd', String(pwd));

head = { method: "POST",
                params: {
                uri: uri,
img: $(/гҖҗ[^гҖ‘]/) ? uri.match(/гҖҗ([^гҖ‘]+)/)[1] : "" 
              }}

            //get гҖҗbodyгҖ‘
eval(src.match(/var pgs;([\s\S]*?pgs.+;)/)[1]);
eval('$=' + src.match(/data :([\s\S]*?\})/)[1]);
head.body = Object.keys($).map(key => key + "=" + $[key]).join('&');

            //иЎҘе…ЁгҖҗurlгҖ‘
            url += "/filemoreajax.php," + JSON.stringify(head);

            //ajaxгҖӮиҺ·еҸ–и“қеҘҸдә‘зӣҳж–Үд»¶еҲ—иЎЁгҖӮ
            $ = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
            $ = json.concat($.text != 0 ? $.text :
              //еҜҶз Ғй”ҷиҜҜжҸҗзӨә
              [{ name_all: $.info,
                time: uri.replace(/[#\?].*/, '') +$.info,
                url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/, '') }]
                                         )
            baseUrl = url
          }
          //и“қеҘҸдә‘еҲҶз»„з»“жқҹрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ў

}
//catch (err)з»“жқҹрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ң

java.put('url', baseUrl);
JSON.stringify($);
</js>$.[*]

            head.body = Object.keys($).map(key => key + "=" + $[key]).join('&');


            //иЎҘе…ЁгҖҗurlгҖ‘
url += "/filemoreajax.php," + JSON.stringify(head);

            //ajax
            $ = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
            $ = json.concat($.text != 0 ? $.text :
             //еҜҶз Ғй”ҷиҜҜжҸҗзӨә
             [{name_all: $.info,
               time: uri.replace(/[#\?].*/, '') + $.info,
               url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/, '') }]
                                        )
            baseUrl = url
        }
        //рҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўи“қеҘҸеҲҶз»„з»“жқҹ

    }
    //рҹ’ҡрҹ’ҡ2 и“қеҘҸз»“жқҹ

}
//вҷҘcatch(err)з»“жқҹ

java.put('url', baseUrl);
JSON.stringify($);
</js>$.[*]

<js>
try {$ = JSON.parse(src).text;
       if ($ == "no file") $ = []; } 

//catch (err)рҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ңрҹ’ң
catch (err) {

        //еҸ–ж¶ҲеҲҶдә«рҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ў
        if (String(java.getString('.off@text')).match(/еҸ–ж¶ҲеҲҶдә«/)) {
            $ = [{
                name_all: java.getString('.off@text'),
                time: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/g, ''),
                url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/g, '')
                  }]   }


        //и“қеҘҸдә‘еҲҶз»„рҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ўрҹ§Ў
        else {
            json = [];
            name = java.getString('.user-radio@text||title@text')
            java.getElements('#folder .mlink').forEach(a => {         java.setContent(a);
                json.push({
                    name_all: java.getString('.filename@textNodes'),
                    url: java.getString('a@href'),
                    time: 'рҹ—ӮпёҸ folderгҖҖрҹ“‘ ' + (String(java.getString('.filesize@text')) || name)                      })
     })

           java.setContent(src);

            mat = baseUrl.match(/^(.*?\.com)[^##]*\/(.+)$/)
            url = mat[1]
            uri = mat[2]

            function $(reg) {
                return uri.match(reg) ? true : false }

            //getгҖҗpwdгҖ‘(й“ҫжҺҘжҸҗеҸ–з Ғ)
pwd =
$(/##[^гҖҗ]/) ? uri.match(/##(.*?)(гҖҗ|$)/)[1] : "";
java.put('pwd', String(pwd));

head = { method: "POST",
                params: {
                uri: uri,
img: $(/гҖҗ[^гҖ‘]/) ? uri.match(/гҖҗ([^гҖ‘]+)/)[1] : "" 
              }}

            //get гҖҗbodyгҖ‘
eval(src.match(/var pgs;([\s\S]*?pgs.+;)/)[1]);
eval('$=' + src.match(/data :([\s\S]*?\})/)[1]);
head.body = Object.keys($).map(key => key + "=" + $[key]).join('&');

            //иЎҘе…ЁгҖҗurlгҖ‘
            url += "/filemoreajax.php," + JSON.stringify(head);

            //ajaxгҖӮиҺ·еҸ–и“қеҘҸдә‘зӣҳж–Үд»¶еҲ—иЎЁгҖӮ
            $ = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
            $ = json.concat($.text != 0 ? $.text :

<js>
try {
    $ = JSON.parse(src).text;
    if ($ == "no file") $ = [];
} catch (err) {
    reg = /^(https?\:\/\/((www|m)\.)?baidu\.com\/?\?wd=\s*)+/i;

    if (baseUrl == source.sourceUrl) {
        $ = [{
            name_all: "ж— жі•иҺ·еҸ–еҲҶзұ»пјҹеҸҜиғҪжІЎжңүеҗҜз”Ё",
            time: "еҸідёҠи§’ - гҖҗзҷ»еҪ•гҖ‘еҗҜз”ЁпјҢеҶҚгҖҗеҲ·ж–°еҲҶзұ»гҖ‘"
        }]
    }



    //зҪ‘з«ҷж•ҙеҗҲ
    else if (baseUrl.match(reg)) {
        $ = [];
        baseUrl.replace(reg, '').
        split(/\s*вҖў\s*/).map($$ => $.push({
            name_all: $$.match(/.*?гҖҠ(.*?)гҖӢ/)[1],
            time: $$.match(/в—Һ.*?в—Һ/) ? $$.match(/.*?в—Һ(.*?)в—Һ/)[1] : "",
            uri: $$.match(/гҖҗ.*?гҖ‘/) ? $$.match(/.*?гҖҗ(.*?)гҖ‘/)[1] : "",
            url: $$.match(/^([^гҖҗгҖҠв—Һ]*),?/)[1]
        }));
    }



    //и“қеҘҸдә‘
    else {

        //и“қеҘҸдә‘йқһеҲҶз»„й“ҫжҺҘ
        if (String(java.getString('text.дёҫжҠҘж–Үд»¶@href')).length) {
            $ = [{
                name_all: String(java.getString('class.md@textNodes')),
                icon: String(java.getString('class.md@textNodes')).replace(/.*\./, ''),
                size: String(java.getString('class.mtt@text')).replace(/\( /, '').replace(/ \)/, ''),
                time: String(java.getString('class.mf@textNodes')).replace(/.*\n/, ''),
                uri: baseUrl.replace(/^(.+com).*\/(.+)$/, '$2'),
                url: baseUrl.replace(/^(.+com).*\/(.+)$/, '$1/tp/$2')
            }]
        }


        //еҸ–ж¶ҲеҲҶдә«
        else if (String(java.getString('.off@text')).match(/еҸ–ж¶ҲеҲҶдә«/)) {
            $ = [{
                name_all: java.getString('.off@text'),
                time: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/g, ''),
                url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/g, '')
            }]
        }


        //и“қеҘҸдә‘еҲҶз»„й“ҫжҺҘ
        else {
            json = [];
            name = java.getString('.user-radio@text||title@text')
            java.getElements('#folder .mlink').forEach(a => {
                java.setContent(a);
                json.push({
                    name_all: java.getString('.filename@textNodes'),
                    url: java.getString('a@href'),
                    time: 'рҹ—ӮпёҸ folderгҖҖрҹ“‘ ' + (String(java.getString('.filesize@text')) || name)
                })
            })
           java.setContent(src);


            mat = baseUrl.match(/^(.*?\.com)[^##]*\/(.+)$/)
            url = mat[1]
            uri = mat[2]

            function $(reg) {
                return uri.match(reg) ? true : false
            }


            //getгҖҗpwdгҖ‘(й“ҫжҺҘжҸҗеҸ–з Ғ)
            pwd =
                $(/##[^гҖҗ]/) ? uri.match(/##(.*?)(гҖҗ|$)/)[1] :
                "";



            head = {
                method: "POST",
                params: {
                    uri: uri,
                    img: $(/гҖҗ[^гҖ‘]/) ? uri.match(/гҖҗ([^гҖ‘]+)/)[1] : ""
                }
            }




            //get гҖҗbodyгҖ‘
            eval(src.match(/var pgs;([\s\S]*?pgs.+;)/)[1]);
            eval('$=' + src.match(/data :([\s\S]*?\})/)[1]);
            head.body = Object.keys($).map(key => key + "=" + $[key]).join('&');


            //иЎҘе…ЁгҖҗurlгҖ‘
            url += "/filemoreajax.php," + JSON.stringify(head);



            //ajax
            $ = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
            $ = json.concat($.text != 0 ? $.text :

                //еҜҶз Ғй”ҷиҜҜжҸҗзӨә
                [{
                    name_all: $.info,
                    time: uri.replace(/[#\?].*/, '') + $.info,
                    url: baseUrl.replace(/[#\?].*/, '')
                }])
            baseUrl = url
        }
    }
}
java.put('url', baseUrl);
JSON.stringify($);
</js>$.[*]

		uri = java.put('uri', mat[2])

		return uri.match(reg)?true:false
	}

//getгҖҗpwdгҖ‘(й“ҫжҺҘжҸҗеҸ–з Ғ)

url += `/filemoreajax.php,{"method":"POST","body":"${body}"}`

java.ajax(url)
</js>

//div[@class="url-card io-px-2 col-1a col-sm-1a col-md-2a col-lg-4a col-xl-5a col-xxl-5a "]
//div[@class="url-card io-px-2 col-1a col-sm-1a col-md-2a col-lg-4a col-xl-5a col-xxl-5a "]

<js>
var a='class.module-item';

html=java.getElement(a);

//java.log(html)

if(baseUrl.match(/so/)){
	
	url=baseUrl + source.getVariable() + "-------------.html";
	
	data=java.ajax(url);
	
	//java.log(data)
	
	java.setContent(data);
	
	html=java.getElement(a);
	
	if(data.match("иҜ·дёҚиҰҒйў‘з№Ғж“ҚдҪң")){
		
		java.longToast("жҗңзҙўж—¶й—ҙй—ҙйҡ”5з§’")
		
		}
		else if(data.match("иҫ“е…ҘйӘҢиҜҒз Ғ"))
		{
			yzm=java.getVerificationCode("https://www.freeok.vip/index.php/verify/index.html?")
			
	java.log(yzm)
	
	var yzmurl="https://www.freeok.vip/index.php/ajax/verify_check?type=search&verify="+yzm+","+JSON.stringify({"method": "POST","referer":url});
	
	cookie=java.getCookie(yzmurl);
	
	java.log(java.ajax(yzmurl))
	
	url=url+","+JSON.stringify({"cookie":cookie})
	
	java.log(url)
	
	data=java.ajax(url)
	
	//java.log(data)
	
	java.setContent(data);
	
	html=java.getElement(a);
}
  
	}else{html=html}
	html
</js>
